hero.title: SAFFRON
hero.subtitle: Authentic Persian flavors — kebabs, saffron rice, and stews crafted with tradition and the finest ingredients.

offers.title: Special
offers.subtitle: Exclusive Persian feasts and combos crafted for you

footer.taglineLong: Authentic Persian cuisine since 2010. Saffron, kebabs, and warm hospitality.

about.title: Our Story
about.description: Authentic Persian cuisine and warm hospitality in the heart of the city.
about.story1: What began as a family dream to share the taste of Iran has become Saffron House — your place for tender kebabs, fragrant saffron rice, and slow-cooked stews. Our founder, Chef Niusha, brought her grandmother's recipes and a belief that every guest deserves a true Persian feast.
about.story2: We use only the finest ingredients: premium lamb and chicken, basmati rice, real saffron, and fresh herbs. Every dish is prepared with care and the same traditions that have been passed down for generations.
about.story3: Today we serve thousands of guests each week, but we've never lost sight of what matters: quality, warmth, and the taste of home.
about.quote: Every dish tells a story. Ours is one of saffron, family, and the pursuit of authentic flavor.
about.value1Text: We use the freshest herbs, spices, and produce in every dish.
about.value2Text: Our chefs bring generations of Persian cooking to your table.
about.value3Text: We're proud to be a place where everyone feels welcome.

order.title: Order
order.emptyPrompt: Add some delicious Persian dishes to get started!
